c1.speaker: dot
c1.line: Gibbons. The seal was the family's, the key was the family's, and you've got the manor look about you — the one your grandfather got when a story stopped being fun. Sell me today. Gently.

choices.line: The trail ends at the manor. Today I find out which Vale — and I do it with my hat in my hands.
I think I already know. Today I make sure I'm wrong before I let myself be right.

c3.speaker: dot
c3.line: Good. Both of those were the right answer, which almost never happens at this desk.

c4.speaker: dot
c4.line: You know what your grandfather never did? Publish angry.
